title: Customer relationship marketing (CRM)
summary: 9609 AS — CRM systems, loyalty, and long-term customer value.
learningObjectives: Define CRM and its business purpose.
Explain how CRM data improves marketing.
Evaluate costs and benefits of CRM.

simpleExplanation.title: Keep customers coming back
simpleExplanation.summary: CRM uses data to build lasting relationships, increasing repeat sales and lifetime customer value.
steps: CRM software integrates sales and service.

sections.content: **CRM** (3.1.7) completes **Topic 3.1**. Contrast **transactional vs relationship** marketing in evaluation.
